normalization.notes: Store Adlam text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Do not compatibility-fold case or punctuation; review any shaping behavior against selected fonts.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Adlam letters, case pairs, vowel letters, diacritics, punctuation, and high-frequency word chunks
segmentation.notes: Adlam is an RTL modern community script. Lessons must use bidi isolation when embedded in English UI and should keep transliteration separate from canonical text.

sources.notes: Adlam code point metadata for letters, digits, punctuation, and combining marks. Use as infrastructure metadata only.

sources.notes: Fulani Adlam locale data where available. Confirm exact CLDR release and locale coverage before ingestion.
Rendering and fallback test source. Not a text corpus.
